puzzle.title: The First to Seek Forgiveness
puzzle.intro: Step back to a time before the first sunrise, before any mortal walked the earth. A figure was fashioned from the humblest of materials, given a station above the angels, and placed in a sacred garden with a clear warning. Yet in a single moment, a choice was made — one that would echo through all of human history. Who is this figure?
clues: I was brought into being in a way unlike any other — fashioned from the dust of the earth and given a living soul by the hand of the Creator.
I was granted knowledge so profound that even the angels above marveled at it.
All of heaven was commanded to bow before me, and they all submitted — except one, who refused out of pride.
I was placed in a sacred garden, a place of eternal comfort and provision — but with one strict prohibition.
I forgot, I slipped, and I disobeyed — and I felt the weight of my error deeply.
I turned to my Lord with heartfelt words, and He accepted my repentance, for He is the Most Forgiving.

trial.label: Trial/Event
options: The angels were commanded to prostrate
A great fire was made cool and safe
An arrogant ruler was drowned in the sea
An army of elephants was destroyed
trial.answer: The angels were commanded to prostrate

outcome.label: Outcome
options: The nation was struck by a mighty blast

puzzle.arabic: فَتَلَقَّىٰٓ ءَادَمُ مِن رَّبِّهِۦ كَلِمَـٰتٍۢ فَتَابَ عَلَيْهِ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلتَّوَّابُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
puzzle.verse: Then Adam received from his Lord [some] words, and He accepted his repentance. Indeed, it is He who is the Accepting of Repentance, the Merciful. (2:37)
